title: Split initial Turborepo bootstrap into reusable templates
body: Split the initial Turborepo bootstrap into reusable templates so new dissertation experiments can spin up web/api packages with one command.

title: Expand pnpm workspace + Vitest setup with coverage thresholds and CI gates
body: Expand the pnpm workspace + Vitest setup to include repository-wide test coverage thresholds and CI failure gates.

title: Consolidate duplicated GitHub Actions workflows into a reusable matrix workflow
body: Consolidate duplicated GitHub Actions build/deploy/CI workflows into a single reusable workflow with matrix jobs for web and api.

title: Harden Prisma env validation for DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_DATABASE_URL
body: Harden Prisma configuration by validating DATABASE_URL/DIRECT_DATABASE_URL at startup and failing fast with actionable diagnostics.

title: Finalize API TypeScript + ESLint workflow integration
body: Finalize API TypeScript + ESLint workflow integration by enforcing max-warnings=0 and adding lint/typecheck scripts to every workspace package.

title: Upgrade push CI with pnpm cache and parallel lint/typecheck/test/build
body: Upgrade the push CI workflow to cache pnpm store and parallelize lint/typecheck/test/build for faster dissertation iteration cycles.

title: Replace GitOps/Scaffolder mock data with live API data and contract tests
body: Replace remaining mock data in GitOps/Scaffolder with live API data and add contract tests for the API response shapes.

title: Refactor DORA and Sonar metric fetching into provider adapters
body: Refactor DORA and Sonar metric fetching in devanalytics into provider adapters to support GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket comparisons.

title: Strengthen JWT auth with refresh tokens and revocation
body: Strengthen JWT auth introduced in login/register by adding refresh tokens, revocation, and secure cookie transport in production.

title: Enforce feature-folder boundaries in monolith breakup
body: Continue monolith breakup by enforcing feature-folder boundaries between scaffolder, gitops, and devanalytics modules.

title: Add schema validation and execution sandboxing for RunScaffoldModal
body: Add schema-level validation and execution sandboxing for RunScaffoldModal so generated boilerplates cannot run unsafe commands.

title: Persist dashboard widget layout/version migrations
body: Persist dashboard widget layout/version migrations so older saved user preferences remain compatible after widget schema updates.

title: Centralize LoginPage API routing and runtime health checks
body: Remove hardcoded API endpoint fallbacks from LoginPage and centralize environment-based API routing with runtime health checks.

title: Add E2E tests for vercel.json SPA rewrites
body: Add end-to-end tests for vercel.json SPA rewrites to prevent deep-link 404 regressions after deployment changes.

title: Extend admin auth middleware with role scopes and route policies
body: Extend admin auth middleware with role scopes (super-admin, auditor, operator) and enforce route-level authorization policies.

title: Add retry/backoff and SWR caching for key dashboard widgets
body: Add retry/backoff and stale-while-revalidate caching for DeliveryHealth, PRVelocity, RepoPulse, and QuickScaffolder dashboard widgets.

title: Implement Prisma pooling and circuit-breaker logic for transient outages
body: Implement resilient Prisma connection pooling and circuit-breaker logic for transient database outages in api routes.

title: Build audit-log query APIs with filter/sort/export and pagination indexes
body: Build full audit-log query APIs (filter, sort, export) with pagination indexes to support high-volume admin activity tracking.

title: Complete AuthToken lifecycle with hashing rotation and cleanup jobs
body: Complete AuthToken lifecycle by implementing token hashing rotation, single-use guarantees, and cleanup jobs for expired tokens.

title: Instrument Vercel Analytics events for key DevCentral flows
body: Instrument Vercel Analytics events for key DevCentral flows (template run, deploy trigger, PR review) instead of only page views.

title: Wire Vercel Speed Insights metrics into internal dashboards
body: Wire Vercel Speed Insights metrics into internal dashboards so dissertation evaluation can compare UX performance before/after changes.

title: Fix Render deployment workflow secret mismatch and add validation
body: Fix Render deployment workflow secret mismatch (uses VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL) and add validation to block misconfigured deploy runs.

title: Add Render deploy hook callback logging and deployment history UI
body: Add status callback logging for Render deploy hook triggers and expose deployment history in GitOps Deployments UI.

title: Add server-side pagination/search APIs for GitOps tables
body: Add server-side pagination/search APIs for GitOps Issues/PRs/Releases tables to reduce frontend overfetching on large repos.

title: Add environment-scoped Vercel deploy hooks and branch routing
body: Add environment-scoped Vercel deploy hooks (preview/staging/prod) with branch-to-environment routing in GitOps workflows.

title: Normalize new Prisma models and add rollback migration tests
body: Normalize new Prisma models (ProviderIntegration, RepositoryMetadata, Deployment, HealthCheckResult) and add migration rollback tests.

title: Expand analytics widgets with repository permissions checks
body: Expand PlatformSummary/RecentActivity/PRVelocity widgets with repository permissions checks so private repos fail gracefully.

title: Add automated verification tests for scaffolder generators
body: Add automated verification tests for scaffolder generators (Express, NestJS, FastAPI, Gin, Spring Boot, Next, React) to ensure generated apps build.

title: Reintroduce advanced analytics tabs behind feature flags
body: Reintroduce and stabilize advanced analytics tabs (DeepDive, Flow, Review, DORA, Reliability) behind feature flags with performance budgets.

title: Create IDP feature deprecation playbook
body: Create an IDP feature deprecation playbook to safely remove analytics tabs/components while preserving route compatibility and historical data.
